A new chapter

Qualified and still pushing forward

After a very long wait and a lot of hard work, the certificates have finally come through and the journey to becoming a fully qualified personal trainer has reached a major milestone. That does not mean the progress stops here. JT Personal Training is built on continued growth, better knowledge, better coaching, and creating the best possible experience for every client. This is training with purpose, accountability, and momentum.

Services Offered

Coaching built around your goals

Whether you want to get fitter, stronger, leaner, more confident, or sharpen your boxing and conditioning, every session is tailored to where you are now and where you want to go next.

💥

1-2-1 Coaching

Personalised training tailored to your goals, fitness level, lifestyle, and pace so you can make steady progress with real support.

📈

6 & 12 Week Programmes

Structured plans designed to give you direction, momentum, and measurable results instead of guessing what to do next.

🥊

Boxing Coaching

Improve fitness, conditioning, movement, power, confidence, and coordination with boxing-based training that keeps sessions engaging.

🧠

Mobility & Fat Loss

Support your body properly with mobility work, strength training, and habits that help you feel better and move better long term.
